verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Long, long time ago my heart was burdened with sin, My head bowed in sorrow, the devil had me troubled with-in; I started seeking salvation, I had a hard time resisting temptation, so I kept on searchin till I found the King of Kings.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: Well, I kept on searchin, searchin, I kept on searchin till I found Him, Kept on searchin, searchin, I kept on searchin till I found Him. He changed my heart – so I could live right, Changed my mind – so I could think right, Changed my mouth – so I could talk right, Changed my feet – so I could walk right, Well I kept on searchin till I found the King of Kings.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Looking high and low along that wandering way my soul was full of longing, until one glorious day It was when my anticipation gave a way to sweet consolidation That I kept on on searchin till I found the King of Kings.
